About Me

I'm a B.Tech undergrad student in Computer Science and Engineering, passionate about creating innovative mobile and web solutions. I specialize in Flutter, iOS, and front-end web development.

Flutter Developer

Building cross-platform mobile applications with Flutter, creating beautiful and performant user experiences

iOS Developer

Developing native iOS applications using Swift and SwiftUI, focusing on Apple's design principles

Front End Web Developer

Creating responsive and interactive web applications using React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies

Skills

A comprehensive overview of my technical skills and expertise in various technologies.

Flutter

Cross-platform mobile app development with Flutter, creating beautiful and performant applications for both iOS and Android platforms.

Swift

Native iOS development using Swift and SwiftUI, building high-performance applications following Apple's design guidelines.

Android Development

Native Android app development using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose, creating responsive and user-friendly mobile applications.

React

Modern web development with React, creating responsive and interactive user interfaces with component-based architecture.

JavaScript

Dynamic web development with JavaScript, building interactive and responsive applications with modern ES6+ features.

Firebase

Backend development and real-time data management using Firebase, implementing authentication, cloud storage, and real-time databases.

Git

Version control and collaborative development using Git, managing code repositories and implementing efficient workflows.

Spline

3D design and interactive web experiences using Spline, creating immersive 3D content and animations for web applications.

Tools

Additional tools and platforms I work with to create comprehensive digital solutions.

Webflow

No-code web development using Webflow, creating responsive and interactive websites with custom animations and interactions.

Figma

UI/UX design and prototyping using Figma, creating user-centered designs and interactive prototypes for web and mobile applications.

Wix

Website development and e-commerce solutions using Wix, building professional websites with integrated business tools.

Framer

Interactive prototyping and web development with Framer, creating high-fidelity prototypes and responsive websites.

Shopify

E-commerce development using Shopify, building online stores with custom themes and integrated payment solutions.
